Who We Are

India's Trusted Partner for Non-Ferrous Scrap

Based in Surat — Gujarat's commercial heartland — Dhanlaxmi Meta Impex LLP bridges global scrap exporters with Indian manufacturers. We handle sourcing, import, quality checks, and delivery end-to-end.

🌍
Global Sourcing Network
Direct ties with verified exporters across Europe, Americas, Middle East & Asia — best grades at competitive prices.
🏭
Direct to Manufacturers
We supply foundries, smelters & manufacturing units pan-India — no middlemen, lower procurement cost for you.
♻️
We Also Buy From Scrap Yards
Selling scrap? We offer the best market prices for non-ferrous scrap globally. Fast payments, transparent process.

What We Trade

Our Metal Portfolio

Exclusively non-ferrous. Hover any material and click the arrow to learn more about grades, specifications & quality requirements.

Aluminium Scrap
Primary Metal · Lightweight · High-Value · Globally Sourced
6063 Extrusion6061UBCZorbaTaint/Tabor
→
Copper Scrap
Conductive · Precious · In Demand
Birch/CliffBerryCandyWire
→
Brass Scrap
Durable · High Recovery · Trusted
HoneyEbonyShellsMixed
→
Zinc Scrap
Industrial · Essential · Recyclable
Die CastZinc DrossOld Zinc
→
HMS-1 Iron Scrap
Heavy Melting Steel · Grade 1 · Backbone of Manufacturing
HMS 1Heavy MeltingPlate & StructuralIndustrial Grade
→
ℹ️ Note: We do not trade lead or any lead-based scrap materials. Our portfolio is strictly non-ferrous and limited to the five metals above.

How It Works

From Enquiry to Delivery

Four simple steps to get premium scrap metals delivered to your factory gate.

01
Send Enquiry
Tell us your metal, grade & quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a competitive offer.
02
Price & Sample
Best market-linked price quoted. Samples available for inspection before you commit.
03
Order & Ship
We book shipping, handle customs clearance & manage all import-export documentation.
04
Delivered to You
Material arrives at your factory gate anywhere in India — fully tracked, on time.
